scripts.dev: concurrently -n prims,image-editor,ui,feat,web,cloud,storage -c gray,gray,gray,gray,blue,red,green "pnpm web:build:primitives --watch" "pnpm web:build:image-editor --watch" "pnpm web:build:ui --watch" "pnpm web:build:features --watch" "pnpm web:start" "pnpm server:cloud" "pnpm server:storage"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -n prims,image-editor,ui,feat,web,electron -c gray,gray,gray,gray,blue,red "pnpm web:build:primitives --watch" "pnpm web:build:image-editor --watch" "pnpm web:build:ui --watch" "pnpm web:build:features --watch" "pnpm web:start" "pnpm electron:start"
scripts.dev:ngrok: concurrently -n prims,image-editor,ui,feat,web,cloud,storage,nginx,ngrok -c gray,gray,gray,gray,blue,red,green,yellow,magenta "pnpm web:build:primitives --watch" "pnpm web:build:image-editor --watch" "pnpm web:build:ui --watch" "pnpm web:build:features --watch" "pnpm web:start" "pnpm server:cloud" "pnpm server:storage" "pnpm proxy:nginx" "pnpm proxy:ngrok"
